message:
Create 64 beads for 100% SQLModel feature parity

EPIC: bd-162 - 100% SQLModel Feature Parity

Created comprehensive, self-documenting beads covering ALL Python SQLModel features:

## Sub-Epics (12):
- bd-1cr: Field Attributes (40+ parameters)
- bd-1u7: Relationship System
- bd-emz: Session API (all methods)
- bd-1n7: Query Building (advanced SQL)
- bd-1za: Model Serialization (model_dump/validate)
- bd-3lz: ORM Patterns (identity map, unit of work, lazy loading)
- bd-38h: Event Hooks
- bd-1fs: Computed Fields & Hybrid Properties
- bd-1gn: Advanced Type Mappings
- bd-170: Model Configuration & Inheritance
- bd-1qh: Validation System
- bd-u73: Query Caching & Performance

## Key Tasks (51):
P1 (Critical): Identity Map, Unit of Work, Lazy Loading, Session.get/merge,
               CTEs, Window Functions, model_dump/validate, computed fields,
               lifecycle events, alias system, Decimal precision

P2 (Important): UNION/INTERSECT/EXCEPT, EXISTS, LATERAL, bulk ops, read replicas,
                JSON/JSONB, ARRAY, Enum types, validators, inheritance

P3 (Nice to have): Sharding, dynamic models, attribute events

All beads include:
- Detailed Python behavior documentation
- Rust implementation approach
- Acceptance criteria
- Dependencies where applicable

NO EXCLUSIONS. Every Python SQLModel feature will be implemented.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
